Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer On Behalf Of Deft First District Appellate Project, Memorandum Of P/A In Support Thereof And Declaration Of Mark P. Edson; Request For Judicial Notice And Memorandum In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Feb-18-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FIRST DISTRICT APPELLATE PROJECT'S Demurrer. Jason Voelker, Plaintiff in Pro Per, and opposing party, (916) 351-3038, (appearing thru CourtCall). There are no other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: This matter is stayed pursuant to stipulation so that Plaintiff may pursue post-conviction remedies. Coscia vs. McKenna & Cuneo, 25 Cal. 4th 1194. (The Court Room Clerk will Fax Mr. Voelker a copy of today's tentative to Mr. Voelker at Fax Number (916) 351-3086) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
